comments: Yes! I am actually very paranoid about those attention checks because I forget names super easily and there were instance where I was only sure about one person's name in attention check but not the others. And also with which one of them brought sandwich and which one brought snacks! In case I made a mistake, I just do not want this to be held against me.

No other additional comments or suggestions on my end.  Thank you very much for the opportunity and the survey! I have taken my time, followed and read through each of the pages carefully, and have provided my thoughtful and honest feedback throughout.  Thank you! :)
The first AC asking about location is questionable considering the study is focused on behavior/relationships
Thank you for allowing me to participate in your study.
I think I understood the first slider more as the study went on.
Thank you and good luck with your research.
Thought it was a well done study. Wish I could have chosen the options of what they were going to do next. Still a fun study to see how people interact with food. Thank you.
This was very interesting. I liked the way the questions weren't directly related to the situation, rather likes and dislikes and possibilities.
A bit more variety in the suggestions.

Apologies if I missed the memory checks; I promise I was paying attention and am a human, not a bot! I was reading the scenarios carefully and paying attention to each one, but I have crappy short-term/working memory, and my brain just wiped the board clean each time I finished a scenario so I could concentrate well enough on the new one.

oh come on, i don't believe anyone would behave in the way you said. They are not going to each have a bite of a PBJ. Also when people share a drink - relationship I don't think they pay attention or not to where they sip from.
